who: restaurant managers in small to medium-sized restaurants processing 5–15 food safety inspections/month
offer: For restaurant managers in small to medium-sized restaurants processing 5–15 food safety inspections/month, manual tracking causes missed compliance deadlines. We automate compliance reminders instead of manual tracking of inspection scores and reminders.
problem: Ensuring compliance with food safety regulations and avoiding penalties.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to restaurant managers with demo video
Community forums for sharing restaurant management tools
try_it: Let users try customizable compliance reminder notifications and simple dashboard for monitoring inspection status on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
